strategy_canvas.headline_thesis: Flashcart bridges three previously-unbridged things — surplus inventory × HR-channel distribution × PayNow-QR onsite checkout — that no SG player owns end-to-end.

segments.name: MNC HR
segments.descriptor: 500-5,000 staff MNC HR Engagement / EX team; KPI = attendance + NPS

segments.name: SME HR
segments.descriptor: 100-500 headcount SG SME EX/Culture/Ops manager; quarterly cadence

segments.name: Brand Marketing buyer
segments.descriptor: FMCG / wellness / lifestyle brand seeking captive employee audiences

attack_plans.icp: MNC HR Engagement Lead at 500-5,000-staff SG MNC running annual D&D with SGD 5-30/head goodie bag spend
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: SG has ~1,200 MNCs running annual D&Ds; avg 600 attendees × SGD 30/head goodie + SGD 80/head premium kit blend = SGD 66k/event; 1,200 × SGD 66k = SGD 79M annually directly substitutable.
attack_plans.why_gap: No SG player aggregates curated multi-SKU drops with PayNow QR onsite; current default is HoneySpree/Giftano vouchers shipped to office, which kills the goodie-as-event-keepsake mental model.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Elitez Group has hundreds of pre-existing MNC HR relationships across Pulse + EOR + Security + Aviation; flashcart enters warm, not cold-outbound. Brand-funded inventory undercuts the SGD 30-80/head goodie spend.

gtm.channel: Elitez account-team cross-sell to existing MNC HR contacts; SHRI / ARITA HR Lead mailing lists
gtm.pitch: Replace your SGD 30-80/head goodie bag with a flashcart drop. Brand sponsors fund the inventory. Your SGD 18,000 lucky-draw line redirects to memorable wins. Free to host.
gtm.pricing: Annual Engagement Partner SGD 12,000/yr including the D&D activation
gtm.content: MNC case study: 'Why our 600-pax D&D ditched goodie bags'; comparative attendance/NPS deck

attack_plans.icp: FMCG / wellness brand marketing manager looking for high-intent captive employee audiences at MNC offices
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: SG MNC offices ~1,500 with active sampling/wellness programmes; brand spend per pop-up SGD 1,500-4,000; 1,500 offices × 4 brand pop-ups/yr × SGD 4,000 avg = SGD 24M; expansion to mid-size SMEs lifts to SGD 35M.
attack_plans.why_gap: Brand sampling agencies (4R Activation) execute single events; mall pop-ups (Wellness Week SG) charge SGD 200-475/table with low workplace conversion intent. No aggregator routes brand SKUs across multiple MNC employee audiences.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Flashcart aggregates 5-15 captive MNC employee pop-ups/month into a curated drop catalogue. Brand sponsor pays once into the platform, accesses many audiences. PayNow QR mobile checkout means attribution is direct.

gtm.channel: Direct trade-marketing outreach to FMCG/wellness brand teams; SG Trade Marketing community + Brandtech network
gtm.pitch: Sample to 200 high-intent MNC employees in a curated drop. Track redemption to PayNow QR. SGD 4k per pop-up vs SGD 4-6k at a mall table with retail traffic.
gtm.pricing: Per-pop-up brand sponsorship SGD 2,500-4,000 + 8-10% take-rate on GMV
gtm.content: Brand case study with attribution data; trade-marketing webinar on MNC channel ROI

attack_plans.icp: REIT tenant-engagement teams at CapitaLand / Mapletree / Frasers running lobby amenity programmes for office-tower tenants
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: Major SG office REITs operate ~120 Grade-A office buildings; each could host 12 lobby pop-ups/yr at SGD 8,000 GMV/event. 120 × 12 × SGD 8,000 = SGD 11.5M GMV pool.
attack_plans.why_gap: REIT tenant-engagement teams have no brand-partner roster, no retail rail, and no inventory model. Heatmap shows building_mgmt scoring 0-1 across most needs.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Flashcart is the only player that brings supplier-funded inventory + PayNow rail + curated SKU drops; building managers can offer it as a tenant amenity without operating it themselves. Win-win-win economics: REIT gets engagement, tenant employees get drops, brand sponsors get reach.

gtm.channel: Direct partnership pitch to CapitaLand Tenant Engagement, Mapletree Connections, Frasers Property tenant programmes
gtm.pitch: We turn your lobby into a monthly micro-pop-up that costs you nothing. Tenant employees get curated drops; you get a tenant-amenity differentiator at zero capex.
gtm.pricing: Free to building manager; flashcart takes brand-side margin + 8-10% GMV take-rate
gtm.content: REIT case study deck; tenant-engagement metric framework white paper

attack_plans.icp: MNC and SME HR teams running quarterly town halls with declining post-hybrid attendance
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: SG ~3,500 mid-large companies run quarterly town halls; avg activation enhancement spend SGD 2,000/event; 3,500 × 4 × SGD 2,000 = SGD 28M.
attack_plans.why_gap: Post-hybrid attendance dropping at town halls is a known HR problem; current solutions (food trucks, free coffee) don't move attendance. No SG player offers an experience-driven add-on that creates a reason to attend.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Flashcart creates a 'today only' drop adjacent to the town hall — same time-window scarcity that drives Whatnot livestream conversion. HR can show pre/post attendance lift on activation events.

gtm.channel: Cross-sell to existing flashcart MNC accounts adding the quarterly town-hall slot; SHRI roundtables
gtm.pitch: Pair every quarterly town hall with a 30-min flashcart drop after. Attendance goes up. Post-event NPS goes up. Your CFO sees brand-sponsor offset.
gtm.pricing: Bundled inside Quarterly Activation Package SGD 2,500/qtr
gtm.content: Pre/post attendance dashboard + retention case study

attack_plans.icp: SG SME HR with 100-300 staff running an annual wellness fair, eligible for HPB Workplace Health Grant
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: SG has ~3,500 SMEs with 100-300 staff; assume 30% adoption of WHG-claimable wellness activity at SGD 6,000/event mid-market spend, 50% claimable; 3,500 × 0.3 × SGD 6,000 = SGD 6.3M addressable.
attack_plans.why_gap: After HPB Workplace Outreach Wellness sunsets 28 Feb 2026, SMEs lose the previous subsidy default. Most replacement wellness vendors don't have a retail/commerce angle to bring brand co-funding into the equation.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Flashcart's wellness-fair tier is structurally WHG-claimable (50% up to SGD 15k cap) and brings brand-funded SKUs that further reduce HR's net cost. Combination of grant + brand co-funding is unique.

gtm.channel: ASME + SBF wellness-fair partner programmes; HPB-vendor referral channels
gtm.pitch: Your wellness fair, 50% covered by HPB grant, with brand-sponsored inventory on top. Net SME cost can land near zero.
gtm.pricing: Quarterly Activation Package SGD 2,500/qtr; effective SGD 1,250 after WHG
gtm.content: WHG application guide; wellness-fair playbook for SG SMEs
